mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE AGG_DOMAIN_GPU_STAT_30M DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select: SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId, HOST_ID as hostId, UUID_PCI as uuidPci, round(avgMerge(UTILIZATION_AVG),2) as utilization, round(avgMerge(MEMORY_USE_AVG),2) as memoryUse, round(avgMerge(CODE_RATE_AVG),2) as codeRate, round(avgMerge(DECODE_RATE_AVG),2) as decodeRateme, TIME as time FROM AGG_DOMAIN_GPU_STAT_30M WHERE DOMAIN_ID =${domainId} AND TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} GROUP BY TIME, DOMAIN_ID, HOST_ID, UUID_PCI

SELECT rs.UUID_PCI as uuidPci, round(avgMerge(rs.UTILIZATION_AVG),2) as utilization, round(avgMerge(rs.MEMORY_USE_AVG),2) as memoryUse,round(avgMerge(rs.CODE_RATE_AVG),2) as codeRate, round(avgMerge(rs.DECODE_RATE_AVG),2) as decodeRate, rs.TIME as time, DOMAIN_ID as domainId FROM AGG_DOMAIN_GPU_STAT_30M AS rs, (SELECT d.bus, d.uuid, d.cluster_id, d.host_id, d.host_name FROM ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_RES_POOL_DEVICE} AS d WHERE d.res_pool_id = ${resPoolId}) AS dev WHERE (((dev.uuid IS NOT NULL AND dev.uuid = rs.UUID_PCI) OR (dev.bus = rs.UUID_PCI)) AND dev.cluster_id = rs.CLUSTER_ID AND dev.host_id = rs.HOST_ID) AND rs.TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime} GROUP BY time, domainId, uuidPci ORDER BY TIME ASC

SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
UUID_PCI as uuidPci,
round(avgMerge(UTILIZATION_AVG),2) as utilizationAvg,maxMerge(UTILIZATION_MAX) as utilizationMax, minMerge(UTILIZATION_MIN) as utilizationMin
round(avgMerge(MEMORY_USE_AVG),2) as memoryUseAvg, maxMerge(MEMORY_USE_MAX) as memoryUseMax, minMerge(MEMORY_USE_MIN) as memoryUseMin
round(avgMerge(CODE_RATE_AVG),2) as codeRateAvg, maxMerge(CODE_RATE_MAX) as codeRateMax, minMerge(CODE_RATE_MIN) as codeRateMin
round(avgMerge(DECODE_RATE_AVG),2) as decodeRateAvg, maxMerge(DECODE_RATE_MAX) as decodeRateMax, minMerge(DECODE_RATE_MIN) as decodeRateMin
FROM AGG_DOMAIN_GPU_STAT_30M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID = ${domainId}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, UUID_PCI, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT DOMAIN_ID as domainId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
any(UUID_PCI) as uuidPci,
round(avgMerge(UTILIZATION_AVG),2) as utilizationAvg
round(avgMerge(MEMORY_USE_AVG),2) as memoryUseAvg
round(avgMerge(CODE_RATE_AVG),2) as codeRateAvg
round(avgMerge(DECODE_RATE_AVG),2) as decodeRateAvg
FROM AGG_DOMAIN_GPU_STAT_30M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND DOMAIN_ID in (${vmIds})
GROUP BY DOMAIN_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr
